summary: BLOCK 565 Silk Image Fix - All requirements verified and PASSING. AlbumArt component shows no text overlay in loading/error states, uses silk-shimmer diagonal light-sweep animation (CSS @keyframes silkSweep), 0.4s fade-in transition on images, and charcoal Disc icon (#4A4A4A, opacity 0.35) on error state with correct light background (rgb(245, 243, 238)).
critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 565 ✅ - AlbumArt.js completely rewritten with silk-shimmer loading, 0.4s fade-in, charcoal error placeholder
BLOCK 565 ✅ - No text overlay in loading state (lines 33-50) - only silk-shimmer div rendered
BLOCK 565 ✅ - No text overlay in error state (lines 52-59) - only Disc icon, no text elements
BLOCK 565 ✅ - silk-shimmer CSS class (index.css lines 218-230) with diagonal 105deg gradient and silkSweep @keyframes animation
BLOCK 565 ✅ - Animation: 1.8s ease-in-out infinite, background-size 200%, moving from -200% to 200%
BLOCK 565 ✅ - Image fade-in: transition-opacity class + style={{ transitionDuration: '0.4s' }} (line 66)
BLOCK 565 ✅ - Error state: Disc icon with color '#4A4A4A' and opacity 0.35 (line 58)
BLOCK 565 ✅ - Error background: rgba(245, 243, 238, 1) - light cream color (line 56)
BLOCK 565 ✅ - Old honey-shimmer class NOT used in AlbumArt (replaced with silk-shimmer)
Frontend ✅ - ESLint passes with no errors on AlbumArt.js
seed_data_creation: Test record with no cover_url exists for test_recovery@test.com - triggers error state with charcoal Disc icon
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 565 fully verified. AlbumArt component at /app/frontend/src/components/AlbumArt.js handles 3 states: loading (silk-shimmer), loaded (0.4s fade-in), error (charcoal Disc icon). CSS for silk-shimmer is in index.css lines 212-230. The test user has 1 record with no cover_url to test error state.

block_565_fade_in_transition.test_method: Code: line 66 style={{ transitionDuration: '0.4s' }}, Playwright confirmed 12/26 images have 0.4s transition (others are non-AlbumArt images)

block_565_charcoal_disc_icon.description: Error state shows charcoal Disc icon with color #4A4A4A and opacity 0.35
